introduction: This presentation details the community engagement efforts of our IT & Security Department in 2025. Specifically, we will focus on our collaboration with the local food bank.

subsections.heading: Overview of Lee's Market's Corporate Social Responsibility
subsections.content:
• Lee's Market has been committed to corporate social responsibility (CSR) since its inception in 1985
• Each year, the company dedicates approximately 5% of its profits to various CSR initiatives
• In 2020, Lee's Market launched a company-wide sustainability campaign to reduce its carbon footprint
• Lee's Market has sponsored over 20 local cultural events in the past five years as part of its commitment to preserving Asian traditions
• Employee volunteering is a key pillar of Lee's Market's CSR strategy, with each department encouraged to participate in local initiatives
• In 2022, Lee's Market was recognized as one of the top 100 companies for corporate social responsibility by Forbes
subsections.justification: While it provides an overview of Lee's Market's CSR initiatives, it does not specify the volunteer hours of the IT & Security department in 2025.

subsections.heading: IT & Security Department's Community Engagement
subsections.content:
• The IT & Security department has been an active participant in Lee's Market's CSR initiatives since 2015
• The department has partnered with local educational institutions to promote IT literacy
• In 2023, the department launched a mentorship program for students interested in cybersecurity
• The department organizes an annual hackathon to raise funds for local charities
• The IT & Security department has also been involved in initiatives aimed at increasing women's representation in tech
• In 2024, the department received an award for its commitment to community engagement
subsections.justification: It discusses the IT & Security department's community engagement but doesn't mention specifics about their volunteer work with the foodbank in 2025.

subsections.heading: Impact and Insights from the Food Bank Collaboration
subsections.content:
• The collaboration with the local food bank has been an integral part of Lee's Market's CSR efforts since 2020
• Employees across all departments have reported increased morale and team cohesion as a result of participating in the food bank initiative
• The initiative has helped the food bank serve an additional 10,000 meals annually
• Lee's Market's partnership with the food bank has been recognized by local media, enhancing the company's public image
• The company plans to expand its partnership with the food bank to other cities in the future
• In 2024, Lee's Market was named 'Corporate Partner of the Year' by the food bank
subsections.justification: This slide focuses on the general impact of the food bank collaboration, not the specific volunteer hours of the IT & Security department in 2025.

conclusion: Our IT & Security team’s commitment to volunteering has strengthened our corporate social responsibility efforts. Moving forward, we will explore more opportunities for team-building activities that also benefit our community.
